listenings.text: The filing is straightforward. First, a voluntary petition is filed with the court. As soon as it is filed, an automatic stay is granted, and all collection actions are stopped. The company is protected, and it keeps control of the business as debtor in possession.

Hi, this is a quick update on the Vertex case. The reorganization plan was filed with the court last Friday. It has been accepted by the creditors' committee, but court approval is still needed before it takes effect. I will call you once a hearing date is set.

extra_audio.text: A petition is filed with the court. An automatic stay is granted to stop collections. The company keeps control as debtor in possession. A reorganization plan is prepared and filed. The plan is approved by the court.
